mapper.select:
SELECT t.egrp_code, t.ser, t.desc_nm, t.est_type, t.created_by, t.created_at, t.updated_by, t.updated_at FROM tb_estimate_template t
ORDER BY t.egrp_code, t.ser

SELECT acnt_cd, acnt_nm, parent_cd, lvl, unit_cd, use_yn, remark, sort_order, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM tb_estimate_template_item WHERE egrp_code = #{egrp_code} AND ser = #{ser} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_estimate_template_item (egrp_code, ser, acnt_cd, acnt_nm, parent_cd, lvl, unit_cd, use_yn, remark, sort_order, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES (#{egrp_code}, #{ser}, #{acnt_cd}, #{acnt_nm}, #{parent_cd}, #{lvl}, #{unit_cd}, #{use_yn}, #{remark}, #{sort_order}, #{user_id}, NOW(), #{user_id}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_estimate_template_item SET acnt_nm = #{acnt_nm}, parent_cd = #{parent_cd}, lvl = #{lvl}, unit_cd = #{unit_cd}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, remark = #{remark}, sort_order = #{sort_order}, updated_by = #{user_id}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE egrp_code = #{egrp_code} AND ser = #{ser} AND acnt_cd = #{acnt_cd}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_estimate_template_item WHERE egrp_code = #{egrp_code} AND ser = #{ser} AND acnt_cd = #{acnt_cd}
